picks.rationale: Valero leads the universe with +58.61% YTD and +93% 1-year return, strong 1W momentum of +9.76%, P/E 18.95, and a buy analyst consensus; refining margins remain robust despite broader oil volatility.
Marathon Petroleum shows +55.21% YTD and +53% 1-year return, with positive 1M (+2.84%) and 1W (+4.59%) momentum, P/E 16.73, and a buy rating; strong refining cash flows support further upside.
EOG Resources has +25.76% YTD and +11% 1-year return, 1W momentum of +2.02%, low P/E of 13.04, and a buy rating; resilient E&P cash flows and low valuation offer value.
NextEra Energy has +10.98% YTD and +28% 1-year return, positive 1M (+1.78%) and 1W (+2.09%) momentum, P/E 22.48, and a buy rating; AI-driven power demand supports regulated utility growth.
SSE has +8.52% YTD and +32% 1-year return, strong 1W momentum of +4.13%, P/E 23.06, and a buy rating; UK utility with regulated earnings and renewable expansion.
ConocoPhillips has +11.25% YTD and +18% 1-year return, P/E 17.96, low beta of 0.106, and a buy rating with strong analyst score of 1.73; attractive at current oil prices near $70.
ExxonMobil has +12.83% YTD and +27% 1-year return, P/E 22.99, dividend yield 3.02%, and a buy rating; despite recent oil-driven pullback, Permian production and integrated model provide stability.
Chevron has +11.81% YTD and +19% 1-year return, dividend yield 4.16%, and a buy rating with strong analyst score of 1.79; 39-year dividend growth streak supports income-focused investors.
Brookfield Renewable has +0.77% 1W momentum, dividend yield 4.16%, and the highest news sentiment in the universe at 0.561; renewable tailwinds and yield appeal offset YTD decline.
Shell has +3.32% YTD and +9% 1-year return, low P/E of 11.92, dividend yield 4.08%, and a buy rating; buyback pause and oil slump create near-term headwinds but valuation is compelling.
